name: Turkey-Stuffing Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Roasted turkey carcass, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the turkey carcass, water, carrots, celery, onion, parsley, bay leaf, dried thyme, stuffing, gravy, and salt in a soup pot.
2. Place over medium heat and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to a simmer and stir, breaking up all clumps of stuffing.
4. Simmer, covered, for about 1 1/2 hours.
5. Remove the carcass, saving any meat that can be stripped. If necessary, add up to 1 1/2 cups of water to replace evaporation.
6. Adjust salt to taste and let simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Serve hot. Makes about 10 cups, or 8 servings.
Each serving contains about: 367 calories; 412 mg sodium; 94 mg cholesterol; 17 grams fat; 16 grams carbohydrates; 35 grams protein; 0.67 grams fiber.
